profiles.name: balanced
profiles.description: Baseline profile anchored near the current production defaults.

profiles.name: low_latency
profiles.description: Reduce retrieval frequency and tighten answer selection for faster responses.

profiles.name: high_accuracy
profiles.description: Favor retrieval and evidence weighting when freshness or grounding is ambiguous.

profiles.name: memory_conservative
profiles.description: Trim episodic retention and clamp growth to minimize store expansion.

profiles.name: retrieval_aggressive
profiles.description: Bias Layer 9 toward external checks when uncertainty or recency cues appear.

profiles.name: retrieval_conservative
profiles.description: Delay external lookup unless confidence is clearly insufficient.

profiles.name: evidence_heavy
profiles.description: Increase grounding pressure from evidence-supported candidates.

profiles.name: confidence_heavy
profiles.description: Prefer high-confidence candidates even when evidence is lighter.

profiles.name: spatial_heavy
profiles.description: Prefer local semantic map fit over external grounding during scoring.

profiles.name: deterministic
profiles.description: Lower selection temperature and require higher confidence for final outputs.

profiles.name: exploratory
profiles.description: Allow more varied final choices under close candidate scores.

profiles.name: long_memory
profiles.description: Retain episodic information longer to measure recall vs memory growth.
